lira.name: Field Research
lira.description: Discover 8 species in the Codex to help my research.
lira.reward_text: Revealed 3 undiscovered species in the Codex!
lira.accept_dialogue: My research needs more data. If you can discover 8 species in the Codex, I'll share my own findings with you — species I've identified from rift energy signatures.
lira.progress_dialogue: You've discovered %d of 8 species so far. Keep exploring!
lira.complete_dialogue: Eight species! This is exactly what I needed. As promised, here are three species I've identified from my energy signature analysis. Check your Codex.

kael.name: Proving Grounds
kael.description: Clear 3 rifts to prove your worth as a Warden.
kael.accept_dialogue: You want to call yourself a Warden? Clear three rifts first. Then we'll talk about improving your squad's deployment capacity.
kael.progress_dialogue: You've cleared %d of 3 rifts. Keep pushing.
kael.complete_dialogue: Three rifts sealed. I'm impressed. Here — I've authorized an expansion to your squad's deployment capacity. You've earned it.

maro.name: Secret Stashes
maro.description: Find 3 hidden rooms in the rifts.
maro.accept_dialogue: The old rift survey maps show hidden chambers that most Wardens miss. Find three of them and I'll reinforce your hull plating with the salvage.
maro.progress_dialogue: You've found %d of 3 hidden rooms. There are more out there.
maro.complete_dialogue: Three hidden rooms! The salvage from those is top-grade. I've reinforced your hull — she can take more punishment now.
